meta.description: UBPS Canon — the LOCKED canonical Question->Answer pairs + the single canonical BeliefSet (bs.canon, name 'UBPS Canon'). A reusable seed fragment: merge it into any seed with `--include scripts/seedUbps/canon.json`, then a user's final Belief lists "bs.canon" in sets[] to signal UBPS membership. The 5 strings are ADDRESS-DETERMINING — do not change them. See CANON.md.

questions.text: I am a part of UBPS.
I consider BS invalid if there are different A for similar Q.
I consider shift firstly to A("0") and then to A as canonical BS shift.
